channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran releases satirical AI video depicting Donald Trump amid rising tensions over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A new Iranian propaganda video has portrayed former U.S. President Donald Trump as a Minion character battling unsuccessfully to open the Strait of Hormuz. The AI-generated clip, released by the Irani...

item.title: President Samia Pays Tribute to Bishop Mfumbusa for His Impact on Communications and Leadership
item.description: Tanzania's President Samia Suluhu Hassan has expressed deep sadness after the passing of Bishop Bernardin Francis Mfumbusa of the Catholic Diocese of Kondoa on April 14, 2026, at Benjamin Mkapa Hospit...

item.title: North Queensland Cowboys Take on Manly Sea Eagles in Round 7 Clash
item.description: The North Queensland Cowboys faced off against the Manly Sea Eagles in Round 7 of the 2026 NRL Premiership at Queensland Country Bank Stadium in Townsville. The match drew significant attention from r...

item.title: Legal Debate Over Iran's Attempt to Charge Tolls in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz remains one of the most vital waterways in the world, carrying about 20 percent of global oil supplies. It connects the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and lies partly within the...

item.title: Armed Bandits Attack Three Communities in Kwara State, Abduct Residents Including School Owner and Wedding Guests
item.description: Na so bandits just launch serious coordinated attacks on some rural communities for Kwara State late Wednesday night. Dem target Iwo Odo-Ore inside Isin Local Government Area, plus Gaa-Idera and Gaa D...

item.title: Kompany Prepares Bayern Munich for Potential Real Madrid Comeback in Champions League
item.description: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany has emphasized caution ahead of the second leg of their Champions League clash with Real Madrid. Despite Bayern holding an advantage from the first leg, Kompan...

item.title: Minor ground contact between Akasa and SpiceJet aircraft at Delhi airport
item.description: At Delhi airport, a minor incident occurred involving an Akasa Air plane and a SpiceJet aircraft. The Akasa plane was stationary at the time, while the SpiceJet plane made contact with it during groun...

item.title: SIC Co-operative Faces Executive Turnover and Financial Struggles
item.description: At the start of 2024, Sarah Wahogo had served as CEO of SIC (formerly Safaricom Investment Co-operative) for about two and a half years. She quietly left the organisation in February 2024, reportedly ...

item.title: Samsung partners with Tanzania to support Dira 2050 development goals in Dodoma
item.description: Samsung has expanded its presence in Dodoma as part of a broader move to support Tanzania's long‑term national plan, Dira 2050. The company is positioning itself as a technology partner in the governm...

item.title: Analysis Suggests Liberal Polling Leads May Overstate Support
item.description: Recent polling in Canada shows the Liberal Party enjoying what appear to be historically large leads over the Conservative Party. However, Abacus Data CEO David Coletto argues that these results may b...

item.title: Suspected drug trafficker killed during PDEA operation in Lanao del Sur
item.description: A suspected large-scale drug trafficker was killed in a shootout with law enforcers during an entrapment operation in Balabagan, Lanao del Sur, on April 14, 2026. The suspect, identified as Farouk Amp...

item.title: UK dog bite fatalities rise sharply from six to 20 in one year
item.description: A recent report has revealed a significant increase in fatalities caused by dog bites in the United Kingdom. According to the data, deaths from dog bites rose from six in 2022 to 20 in 2023, represent...

item.title: Labour Party Confirms Peter Obi Will Not Return, Supports Tinubu’s Second Term
item.description: The National Vice Chairman (South-West) of the Labour Party, Abayomi Arabambi, don declare say former presidential candidate, Peter Obi, no go ever fit return to the party again. Arabambi talk this on...

item.title: Cashew growers in Pudukkottai battle long-term losses after Cyclone Gaja
item.description: Cashew cultivation in Tamil Nadu’s Pudukkottai district, once a dependable livelihood for many families, has been undergoing a difficult period. Farmers in areas like Gandharvakottai and Adhanakottai,...

item.title: Philippine and Chinese Coast Guards Resume Talks on Open Communication to Avoid Incidents
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard and the Chinese Coast Guard have resumed negotiations aimed at establishing 'open communication lines' to prevent dangerous encounters in the West Philippine Sea. This initi...

item.title: Prime Video announces May 1 release date for ‘Sapne Vs Everyone’ Season 2 on global platform
item.description: Amazon Prime Video has officially announced the release date for the second season of its popular Hindi‑language web series ‘Sapne Vs Everyone’, which will premiere worldwide on May 1. The show, creat...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens 10% Loan Program Through Digital System
item.description: The Tanzanian government has seen good progress with the WEZESHA digital platform, which allows people to apply for loans, track repayments, and monitor activities. Dr Festo Dugange, the Deputy Minist...

item.title: FIFA president confirms Iran's participation in 2026 World Cup despite regional conflict
item.description: FIFA president Gianni Infantino has assured that Iran will definitely participate in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which is co-hosted by Canada, the United States, and Mexico. Speaking at an economic confe...

item.title: Philippine and US Troops Demonstrate HIMARS Rocket System in SALAKNIB 2026 Live Fire Exercise
item.description: The Philippine Army Artillery Regiment, together with the 25th Infantry Division of the United States Army Pacific (USARPAC), successfully conducted a live fire exercise using the M142 High Mobility A...

item.title: UDA defends Cabinet Secretaries amid opposition calls for dismissal
item.description: On Thursday, April 16, 2026, UDA spokesperson Hassan Omar publicly defended Cabinet Secretaries Wandayi and Kinyanjui after opposition parties called for their dismissal. The move comes amid ongoing d...
